title: IonQ vs. Quantinuum vs. Infleqtion vs. Rigetti vs. D-Wave: Which Is the Best Quantum Computing Stock to Bet On?
excerpt: Quantum computing could be the next big technological innovation.
content_html:
Quantum computing offers the promise of being the next big technological breakthrough after artificial intelligence (AI). The technology has drawn the interest of the U.S. government, which has been investing in the sector. Meanwhile, investors can buy the stocks of several public companies that are attempting to develop fault-tolerant quantum computers using a variety of different techniques.

Five of the best-known pure plays in the space are IonQ (NYSE: IONQ), Quantinuum (NASDAQ: QNT), Rigetti Computing (NASDAQ: RGTI), Infleqtion (NYSE: INFQ), and D-Wave Quantum (NYSE: QBTS). Let's consider which of these quantum stocks looks like the best buy.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

All quantum computers are built around qubits, which are extremely sensitive to even the slightest external interference. As a result, their computations have high error rates. The error-reduction and error-correction problems are among the chief challenges faced by every company trying to make quantum computing practical.

The two companies at the forefront of accuracy, though, are IonQ and Quantinuum. Both companies use trapped-ion technology: Each qubit in their computers is made out of an individual charged atom (aka, an ion). This method results in qubits that are more stable than qubits created using other techniques. The result is that IonQ has achieved 99.99% 2-qubit gate fidelity (a standard metric for quantum computing accuracy), while Quantinuum sits at 99.92%.

The companies differ primarily in how they hold their qubits in place. IonQ uses a combination of lasers and microwave antennas built into its chips, while Quantinuum employs only lasers, arguing that microwave antennas slow computational speed too much.

Quantinuum is known for its comprehensive software stack, while IonQ has been developing an entire quantum ecosystem, having made acquisitions in quantum sensing, networking, and satellite transmission. It is even in the process of acquiring quantum chip foundry SkyWater Technology, a deal that will enable it to manufacture its own chips in-house and become vertically integrated.

Rigetti Computing

Rigetti is pursuing one of the more common approaches to quantum computing: superconducting qubits. These are electronic circuits that can be made in conventional semiconductor fabs. While they must be brought to temperatures near absolute zero in order to operate, which requires expensive dilution refrigerators, they are controlled by microwave pulses, and the qubits don't need bulky lasers to hold them in place.

sentences.zh: 它甚至正在收购量子芯片代工厂 SkyWater Technology，这笔交易将使其能够在内部制造自己的芯片并实现垂直整合。

sentences.zh: 放弃计算

blocks.html_en: Rigetti is pursuing one of the more common approaches to quantum computing: superconducting qubits. These are electronic circuits that can be made in conventional semiconductor fabs. While they must be brought to temperatures near absolute zero in order to operate, which requires expensive dilution refrigerators, they are controlled by microwave pulses, and the qubits don't need bulky lasers to hold them in place.

sentences.en: Rigetti is pursuing one of the more common approaches to quantum computing: superconducting qubits.
sentences.zh: Rigetti 正在研究一种更常见的量子计算方法：超导量子位。

sentences.en: These are electronic circuits that can be made in conventional semiconductor fabs.
sentences.zh: 这些是可以在传统半导体工厂中制造的电子电路。

sentences.en: While they must be brought to temperatures near absolute zero in order to operate, which requires expensive dilution refrigerators, they are controlled by microwave pulses, and the qubits don't need bulky lasers to hold them in place.
sentences.zh: 虽然它们必须达到接近绝对零的温度才能运行，这需要昂贵的稀释冰箱，但它们是由微波脉冲控制的，并且量子位不需要笨重的激光器将它们固定到位。

content_html_zh:
量子计算有望成为继人工智能 (AI) 之后的下一个重大技术突破。 这项技术引起了美国政府的兴趣，并一直在该领域进行投资。 与此同时，投资者可以购买几家试图使用各种不同技术开发容错量子计算机的上市公司的股票。

该领域最著名的五家公司是 IonQ（纽约证券交易所股票代码：IONQ）、Quantinuum（纳斯达克股票代码：QNT）、RigettiComputing（纳斯达克股票代码：RGTI）、Infleqtion（纽约证券交易所股票代码：INFQ）和 D-Wave Quantum（纽约证券交易所股票代码：QBTS）。 让我们考虑一下这些量子股票中哪一个看起来最值得购买。

错过了 2009 年的 Nvidia？ 这个罕见的信号再次闪烁。 2009年，一家名不见经传的芯片制造商英伟达发出了“双倍下跌”的信号。 多年来，对于一家规模仅为 Nvidia 1/100 的公司来说，同样的“完全确信”信号闪烁。 继续 ”

所有量子计算机都是围绕量子位构建的，即使是最轻微的外部干扰，量子位也极其敏感。 因此，他们的计算错误率很高。 减少错误和纠错问题是每家试图使量子计算实用的公司面临的主要挑战之一。

不过，处于准确性前沿的两家公司是 IonQ 和 Quantinuum。 两家公司都使用俘获离子技术：计算机中的每个量子位都由单个带电原子（又名离子）组成。 这种方法产生的量子位比使用其他技术创建的量子位更稳定。 结果是，IonQ 实现了 99.99% 的 2 量子位门保真度（量子计算精度的标准指标），而 Quantinuum 为 99.92%。

这些公司的主要区别在于如何固定量子位。 IonQ 使用内置于其芯片中的激光器和微波天线的组合，而 Quantinuum 仅使用激光器，认为微波天线过多地降低了计算速度。

Quantinuum 以其全面的软件堆栈而闻名，而 IonQ 一直在开发整个量子生态系统，并在量子传感、网络和卫星传输领域进行了收购。 它甚至正在收购量子芯片代工厂 SkyWater Technology，这笔交易将使其能够在内部制造自己的芯片并实现垂直整合。

放弃计算

Rigetti 正在研究一种更常见的量子计算方法：超导量子位。 这些是可以在传统半导体工厂中制造的电子电路。 虽然它们必须达到接近绝对零的温度才能运行，这需要昂贵的稀释冰箱，但它们是由微波脉冲控制的，并且量子位不需要笨重的激光器将它们固定到位。
